canonical_label: Italian DPA provisional order on ChatGPT processing
default_manuscript_role: Use as bounded substantive exemplar with paired limitation sentence.
allowed_claim_now: One document-grade process-integrity anchor grounded in issuing-authority order text.
forbidden_overread: Do not generalize from one regulator order to wider legal-system contamination or final illegality.
caption_safe_claim: Italian DPA order text gives shard 008 one document-grade process-integrity anchor grounded in issuing-authority text.

next_stronger_source_needed: Second document-grade court, tribunal, or institutional process-integrity row from another family.

paper_thesis_use: Anchor row for methods/results prose on maximum current authority in shard 008.

canonical_label: Finnish AI-assisted administrative appeals with fabricated-case-reference signals
default_manuscript_role: Use for appendix/methods/results-comparator prose only, with explicit authority caveat.
allowed_claim_now: Reviewer-safe multilingual procedural-contamination row with institution-specific descriptive support but no official phenomenon confirmation.
forbidden_overread: Machine-assisted reading plus one journalistic source is not enough for final legal or policy conclusions.
caption_safe_claim: Direct Yle source text plus a bounded official-probe ladder make one multilingual procedural-contamination row reviewer-legible without claiming official event confirmation.
caption_limitation: Treat the official probes as search-surface evidence and actor-role context only; the phenomenon itself is still supported by one non-official source and machine-assisted reading.
next_stronger_source_needed: Direct Finnish police, court, ministry, or judicial-process document confirming the phenomenon or procedural response.
dashboard_hook: Multilingual verification-limits panel and authority-escalation ladder
paper_thesis_use: Core multilingual limitations and evidence-escalation example for hostile-reviewer defense.

canonical_label: Journal taking corrective actions after learning author used ChatGPT to update references
default_manuscript_role: Use for appendix/methods/results-comparator prose only, with explicit authority caveat.
allowed_claim_now: Article identity is verified, Crossref exposes a publisher-deposited corrigendum DOI relation, and a named editor is publicly quoted; direct journal notice text remains uncaptured.
forbidden_overread: Do not describe final editorial action as complete or infer correction wording unless the journal or publisher record is directly captured.
caption_safe_claim: Shard 008 can show an intermediate research-integrity class where article identity is verified, correction-status metadata is visible, and a named editor is publicly quoted, but no direct journal notice is captured.
caption_limitation: Do not describe the editorial action as final or infer correction wording unless a direct journal or publisher record is captured.
next_stronger_source_needed: Direct journal or publisher correction, retraction, or notice text.
dashboard_hook: Research-integrity source-depth ladder and authority-source facet
paper_thesis_use: Methods/results note on why correction-status metadata plus mediated institutional statements remain distinct from direct notices.

canonical_label: NEJM retracts case study for AI-manipulated imagery
default_manuscript_role: Use as a bounded source-depth exemplar with explicit archive/public caveat.
allowed_claim_now: Archived public NEJM notice text plus an archived original-page RETRACTED banner expose the authors' AI-assisted image-manipulation explanation and the journal's disclosure-policy framing.
forbidden_overread: Use the archived notice text narrowly and do not generalize into broader misconduct, clinical significance, or prevalence claims.
caption_safe_claim: Shard 008 now has one non-Springer archive-resolved direct-notice exemplar where archived public NEJM pages expose direct publisher-originating text rather than metadata alone.
caption_limitation: Keep the archive-resolved distinction explicit and do not imply that the live NEJM page is reachable from this lane.
next_stronger_source_needed: Seed-review memo, direct SAGE notice, or second document-grade procedural family.
dashboard_hook: Blocked-versus-archived route facet and notice-depth funnel
paper_thesis_use: Synthetic-evidence contamination example with bounded direct notice text and explicit archive-route caution.

canonical_label: We’ve seen computer-generated fake papers get published. Now we have computer-generated fake peer reviews.
default_manuscript_role: Keep visible as backlog, historical baseline, or residual-cluster evidence; do not use as a substantive exemplar.

forbidden_overread: Do not treat the report alone as authoritative confirmation for any specific publisher action.

caption_limitation: The specialist report alone does not support case-level sanctions, publisher findings, or prevalence claims.

paper_thesis_use: Historical baseline showing research-integrity contamination predates current LLM hype.

canonical_label: Medical journal publishes a letter on AI with a fake reference to itself
default_manuscript_role: Use as bounded substantive exemplar with paired limitation sentence.

forbidden_overread: Use only the notice-bounded rationale and do not generalize across publishers or infer intent.
caption_safe_claim: Shard 008 has one direct publisher/editor notice-text exemplar tying a retraction to peer-review-policy failure, unverifiable references, and an author-stated generative-AI reference-conversion explanation.
caption_limitation: Use only the notice-bounded rationale on the page and do not generalize across publishers, venues, or author intent.
next_stronger_source_needed: One non-Springer or otherwise publisher-diverse direct-notice exemplar.
paper_thesis_use: Strongest shard-008 exemplar for appendix, methods, and claim-ceiling writing.

canonical_label: Springer Nature book on machine learning is full of made-up citations
default_manuscript_role: Use as bounded substantive exemplar with paired limitation sentence.

forbidden_overread: Use only the notice-bounded rationale about unverifiable references; do not infer generative-AI causation, intent, or broader publisher practice from this one book notice.
caption_safe_claim: Shard 008 now has a second direct publisher-originating notice-text exemplar on a book surface, with a public Springer chapter PDF stating reference-validity concerns and an inability to verify 25 of 46 references.
caption_limitation: Use only the notice-bounded rationale about unverifiable references; do not infer generative-AI causation, intent, or broader publisher practice from this one book notice.
next_stronger_source_needed: One non-Springer or otherwise publisher-diverse direct notice beyond the current Springer-only pair.
dashboard_hook: Venue-type comparison panel, notice-text funnel, and metadata-consistency facet
paper_thesis_use: Venue-type comparator showing that direct notice text now spans journal and book surfaces inside shard 008 while remaining single-publisher-family.
